---
title: "Exploring the Palmer Penguins Dataset"
author: "Sofia"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Setup chunk for loading required libraries
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Load the required packages
library(palmerpenguins)  # The Palmer Penguins dataset package
library(tidyverse)       # For data manipulation and visualization

# Count the number of columns (variables) in the dataset
ncol(penguins)

# Count the number of rows (individual penguins) in the dataset
nrow(penguins)

# Count how many penguins fall into each sex category (including missing data)
table(penguins$sex, useNA = "ifany")

# Create a dataframe containing only male penguins using exact matching
pmale <- penguins %>% 
  filter(sex == "male")

# Create a dataframe containing only female penguins using exact matching
pfemale <- penguins %>% 
  filter(sex == "female")

# Count the number of observations for each penguin species
table(penguins$species)

# Subset the data to isolate Adélie penguins
pAdel <- penguins %>% 
  filter(species == "Adelie")

# Subset the data to isolate Chinstrap penguins
pChin <- penguins %>% 
  filter(species == "Chinstrap")

# Subset the data to isolate Gentoo penguins
pGen <- penguins %>% 
  filter(species == "Gentoo")

# Count how many penguins were observed on each island
table(penguins$island)

# Subset the data to isolate penguins from Biscoe Island
iBis <- penguins %>% 
  filter(island == "Biscoe")

# Subset the data to isolate penguins from Dream Island
iDream <- penguins %>% 
  filter(island == "Dream")

# Subset the data to isolate penguins from Torgersen Island
iTorg <- penguins %>% 
  filter(island == "Torgersen")
```
